title: Jarul’s Legend Is Challenged
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am competent... but no one's perfect. You can't excel from all angles on your own.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should be thanking those two, not this old man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ooh!!! Well aren't you a fine marine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, don't worry about it, my friend is alright!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He tried so hard, he ended up covered in wounds, he's the coolest Marine Ever!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wow... I've never met a cool marine like that...

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 15 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
